name: Red Vino Landscape
tagline: Licensed, bonded Windsor landscaping — design, build, and maintenance from a full crew that shows up seven days a week.
seoDescription: Red Vino Landscape is a licensed, bonded landscaping company in Windsor, CA — design, installation, and maintenance from a full crew, ranked in the top 22% of California licensed contractors.

sections.heading: Licensed Windsor landscaping, from the first design to the weekly mow
sections.subheading: Red Vino Landscape is a licensed, bonded landscaping company serving Windsor and Sonoma County — design, installation, and maintenance handled by a full crew, with a contractor rating in the top 22% of the state. Owner Danny Gomez runs every job.

sections.heading: New on the books, serious about the work
body: Founded in 2023, Red Vino Landscape has grown fast for a reason: owner Danny Gomez built it around doing the job properly and standing behind it. The company is fully licensed and bonded, carries a $2 million insurance policy, and ranks in the top 22% of California licensed contractors.
With a full crew and a seven-day schedule, Red Vino takes on the whole arc of a yard — design, installation, and the ongoing maintenance that keeps it looking the way it did on day one.
highlights: Full crew, available seven days a week

sections.heading: From bare dirt to a finished yard

items.title: Landscape Design & Build
items.description: Full design and installation — hardscape, planting, and the layout that ties a yard together.

items.title: Lawn Care & Maintenance
items.description: Regular mowing, edging, and upkeep that keeps the property sharp year-round.

items.title: Irrigation
items.description: Efficient irrigation install and repair to keep everything green without waste.

items.title: Planting & Beds
items.description: Trees, shrubs, and beds chosen and placed to thrive in the North Bay.

items.title: Hardscape & Cleanups
items.description: Paths, borders, and seasonal cleanups to finish and refresh the space.

items.title: Commercial & Residential
items.description: A crew large enough for commercial grounds and attentive enough for a home yard.

items.title: Walk the property
items.body: We look at the space, hear what you want, and talk through what’s realistic.

items.title: A clear plan & bid
items.body: You get a straightforward plan and an honest estimate before work starts.

items.title: The crew gets to work
items.body: Licensed and bonded, the full crew handles install or maintenance directly.

items.title: Kept looking right
items.body: Optional ongoing maintenance keeps the finished yard sharp.

items.title: Licensed, bonded, insured
items.body: A $2M policy and a state bond — the work is covered.

items.title: Top-tier contractor rating
items.body: Ranked in the top 22% of California licensed contractors.

items.title: A real crew
items.body: Enough hands to take on big jobs and keep a schedule.

items.title: Available all week
items.body: Open seven days, so projects don’t stall.

sections.heading: Ready to transform your yard?
sections.body: Red Vino Landscape serves Windsor and Sonoma County. Call (707) 328-2327 for a free walk-through and estimate.

items.q: Do you do both design and maintenance?
items.a: We do both — full landscape design and installation, plus ongoing lawn care and maintenance.
Windsor and the surrounding Sonoma County area.

items.q: How do I get an estimate?
items.a: Call (707) 328-2327 or email us and we’ll come walk the property.
